{{Quote|A Banking Clan frigate accidentally picked up your escape pod's emergency beacon in the Jenuwaa Sea. Your crew was not so lucky, I'm afraid.|San Hill, lying to Grievous about the ''Martyr''{{'s}} crash|<ref name="Eyes" />}}
The '''Jenuwaa Sea''' was a small body of water located on [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]], which was the site of a battle between the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] and [[Yam'rii/Legends|Yam'rii]] during the [[Huk War]]. When [[Ronderu lij Kummar]] was killed battling the Yam'rii on the beaches of Kalee, her body was lost to the waters of the Jenuwaa Sea. Later in the war, when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] planted a bomb aboard [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]' shuttle, the destroyed ship plummeted into the sea. Grievous was ejected from the wreckage of the shuttle at [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] command, and his shattered body was recovered from the cold waters by the Sith Lord, ready for reconstruction as a cyborg.
